Suraj Singh Chandel
(Suraj Singh Chandel The Third)
5.151 D
3.658 S
Career Stats
Matches: 95 · since Oct '22 · last played Feb 27, 2025
Primary partner: Dipen Patel · 49-9 (84%)
Best chemistry: Rachel Rhoney · 8-1 (89%)
Worst chemistry: Jigar Patel · 4-1 (80%)
Strongest partner: Dipen Patel · 4.918
Weakest partner: Brooke Hopkins · 3.839
Biggest rival: Devin Garcia-Roblero · 5 matches (3-2)
DUPR ID: 896GX7
Notes: Bleed test: Suraj is a RVA-based 5.1 DUPR with a legendary third-shot drop and an even more legendary habit of arriving on court with three paddles, two water bottles, and a backup pair of indoor shoes. He switched from singles to doubles last year because standing still made his knees question their career choices. Known for calling his partner 'pardner' (intentional), for an unusual grip-change during serves, and for a pre-match routine that involves eight minutes of silent visualization and one very loud high-five. Rumor has it he once won a rec-league final 11-9 after being down 1-7 by switching to lobs that defied local gravity. Also: allegedly invented a spin serve he calls 'the helicoptero,' which no one has yet confirmed exists on video. Cardio: above average. Snack game: elite. Banter: unfiltered. Do not lend him your backup grip.
